response:
Subject: Thank You for Your Support  

Dear Mr. Ivan Klimkovic,  

Thank you for your helpful and detailed response. I hope this message finds you well.  

I would like to clarify that the current machine vision system in question is the FLIR FL3-U3-120S3C-C. Based on the technical data provided, the image sensor used on this device is the Sony IMX172, not the e2V sensor.  

I have attached the relevant technical documentation to this email for your reference. Please find the FL3-U3-Technical-Reference PDF file for detailed specifications and the FL3-U3-EMVA-Imaging PDF file, specifically page 13, for quantum efficiency information.  

I will review these files and manuals more carefully and will get back to you with any further insights or questions.  

Thank you again for your assistance.  

Best regards,  
[Your Name]
